name: Shanghai Disneyland
owner: Shanghai Shendi Group (57%) The Walt Disney Company (43%)
description: Shanghai Disneyland (Pinyin: Shànghǎi díshìní lèyuán, Shanghainese: Zaon-he Diq-zy-nyi Loq-yoe) is a theme park located in Chuansha New Town, Pudong, Shanghai, China, that is part of the Shanghai Disney Resort.  The park is operated by Disney Experiences and Shanghai Shendi Group, through a joint venture between the Walt Disney Company and Shendi.  Construction began on April 8, 2011.
imageAttribution: The Enchanted Storybook Castle, landmark of Shanghai Disneyland
